title: The Officers Begin to Fall
description: On pages 16–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Franky. The core beat is the officers begin to fall.
scene: The scene follows the officers begin to fall, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Franky.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What in the....?!!! That's the promised ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who could be capable of this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is bad... very bad indeed ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: ...Is something the matter, father?! Clearly this is an unforeseen development, but still...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There is no reason to overreact ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That ship is simply an ancient relic! It is of little consequence in this day and -

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You do not understand!!! Nothing can be allowed to happen to that ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must not be moved under any circumstance!! Not until the appointed day arrives!!!

summary: The Officers Begin to Fall. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
